heroHeadline: Iranian Missile Strikes Industrial Area in Southern Israel; Israeli Strikes Kill 14+ Across Lebanon
heroSubtitle: Iran demonstrates retained offensive capacity with direct missile strike on Israeli territory; multi-front escalation deepens as Israel simultaneously presses Lebanon campaign killing at least 14.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
